creator: roam@orbitel.bg
text:
File: [freebsd] / ports / editors / vim5 / Makefile (download)
   Revision 1.84, Mon Oct 9 16:59:06 2000 UTC (14 hours, 57 minutes ago)
   by obrien
   Branch: MAIN
   CVS Tags: vim_5_7_10, HEAD
   Changes since 1.83: +8 -7 lines
Update Vim 5.7 to patchlevel 10.

This is the commit in question; it adds 10 patchfiles.  However, it does
not touch the 'distinfo' file, so 'make extract' and everything afterwards
fails with missing checksums for the patchfiles.

How-To-Repeat: 
cd /usr/ports/editors/vim5 && make extract
